plastics-supplier-company-peek-polyether.name: PEEK, PolyEtherEther-Ketone
plastics-supplier-company-peek-polyether.raw_markdown_text:
# Material Specification Sheet **Name:** PEEK, PolyEtherEther-Ketone **Supplier:** Plastics Supplier Company # Material description PEEK is a high-performance engineering thermoplastic. It is strong, rigid, and highly resistant to chemicals,water, steam, and elevated temperatures. Because of this combination of properties, PEEK is commonly used in demanding environments where ordinary plastics would not perform well. In some harsh-service applications, it may also be used as a strong alternative to fluoropolymers. # Main benefits PEEK provides strong chemical resistance, low moisture uptake, good wear and abrasion resistance, high mechanical strength, and reliable performance in hot water or steam. It also has a UL94 V-0 flammability rating. # Common applications Typical application areas include automotive, marine, electronics, medical, aerospace, oil and gas, and alternative energy. # Key properties
PropertyValue
Density~1.31-1.32 g/cm3
Water absorption, 24 h0.10-0.15%
Tensile strength14,500-16,000 psi, unfilled PEEK
Tensile modulus450,000-550,000 psi, unfilled PEEK
Flexural strength24,000-25,000 psi, unfilled PEEK
Compressive strength17,000-20,000 psi, unfilled PEEK
Melting temperature644°F/340°C
Maximum operating
temperature		480°F/249°C, unfilled PEEK
Volume resistivity\(4.9x10^{-}16\) ohm-cm, extruded unfilled PEEK
<--- Page Split --->
